title: Shay v2 architecture rebuild + capture flywheel MVP
summary: Iteration 2 of the FAMtastic total-ask plan. Shipped: Shay v2 architecture (6→2 surface consolidation, page-context registry, handoff contract), audit fixes (composer reflow, MutationObserver, layer isolation), Workshop rename + tighten, capture tool MVP (lib/famtastic/capture/), Web chat exporter (bookmarklet + userscript + manual fallback), Workshop tool rail (Cowork-pattern + 2 starter tools), this report generator. Nothing committed — Fritz reviews and commits manually.

categories.title: Architecture & planning docs
categories.description: Living documents that describe the FAMtastic system. Read these first.

items.description: The master plan. North Star, 4-layer architecture, 5 chunks (capture flywheel, Shay v2, ecosystem substrate, infrastructure wins, 18-test eval), iteration cadence. Read this first.

Shay v2 architecture. Two surfaces (Shay-Shay + Workshop), one identity. Handoff contract, page-context registry, tool rail. Updated 2026-05-02b with explicit ecosystem framing (substrate scales to N Studios).
First knowledge-capture artifact. 6 decisions, 5 breakthroughs, 7 gaps, 7 lessons, 3 contradictions, 2 patterns. Each item is PROPOSED — Fritz reviews and approves item-by-item.

categories.title: Visual mockups
categories.description: Static HTML targets that the implementation should converge on. Open each in browser.

items.description: Mockup A: Shay-Shay on Media Studio. Page-context awareness, inline visual reasoning, action chips, Take-to-Workshop handoff trigger.
Mockup B: Shay's Workshop. Tool rail (Cowork-style), workbench with active artifact, docked chat, job queue, inherited handoff context.
Mockup C: Show-Me-How routine. Spotlit UI elements, step counter, hand-back-control affordances.

categories.title: Studio code — UI fixes & v2 substrate
categories.description: Live changes to the running Studio. Refresh localhost:3334 in browser to see them.

items.description: 6→2 surface consolidation (sidebar nav row + sidebar pane removed). Desk → Workshop rename. Workshop tab tightened (max-width 920px, no full-width stretch, no extra cards). Input IDs renamed (shay-shay-input, shay-workshop-input, shay-workshop-shell). Three new script tags for v2 modules.
Composer fix: padding-right is now fixed 96px instead of var(--shay-lite-safe-area). Kills the 'chat moves' feeling caused by JS-driven width recalc.
Layer isolation: isolation:isolate on #shay-lite-shell. Z-index races between orb, callout, mode popup, project picker, brain fallback bar resolved. Plus #pip-direct-input → #shay-shay-input rename.

MutationObserver quieted (no more orb dancing on every chat append — debounced via rAF, only flips on real state transitions). getShayShayContext() now pulls page_context from ShayContextRegistry. All input ID references renamed.
Tab label 'Shay' → 'Workshop' (internal id stays 'shay' for switchTab backwards compat). Input ID references renamed.

categories.title: v2 substrate — new modules
categories.description: New JS modules implementing the Shay v2 architecture primitives.

items.description: Browser-side page-context registry. Pages register; Shay-Shay pulls on demand. Studio-namespaced page IDs (e.g. media_studio.image_grid). Includes __debug.installFakeMediaStudio() for testing.

Shay-Shay → Workshop handoff contract. Structured payload (source page, current artifact, intent, success criteria, follow-up jobs). Auto-renders 'Handoff from Shay-Shay' banner when received. Includes __debug.demoHandoff() for testing.

Workshop tool rail (Cowork-pattern). Pluggable, additive, filters by appliesTo + active Studio. Built-in tools: Workbench (default), Active Job, Cost Tracker. Registration API: ShayWorkshop.registerTool({...}).

categories.title: Capture flywheel (Layer 4)
categories.description: Ecosystem service for ingesting conversations and producing structured captures. Lives in lib/famtastic/, not lib/site-studio/.

items.description: Main API. scanImports(), scanStudioConversations(), scaffoldCapture(), parseApprovedItems(), dryRunPromote(), summary().
CLI: summary, scan, scaffold, dry-run, promote (last not yet implemented). Run with HOME=/path/to/famtastic prefix from sandbox; works natively on user's machine.
Scaffold template with item slots (Decision/Breakthrough/Gap/Lesson/Pattern/Contradiction). Each item has STATUS + LANDS IN headers.
Usage guide. Workflow: drop input → scaffold → fill in → dry-run → promote. ID conventions table. Status (MVP vs. iteration 3+).

categories.title: Web chat exporter
categories.description: Three install paths to export claude.ai chats into the capture flywheel. Open the HTML, install one, start exporting.

items.description: Workflow doc. Three install paths (bookmarklet, userscript, manual paste). How outputs feed the capture tool.
Drag-to-bookmarks-bar installer. Zero install. Opens chat as markdown in new tab. Save and drop into ~/famtastic/imports/web-chats/.
Tampermonkey/Greasemonkey userscript. Adds Export button to claude.ai. Auto-downloads markdown file.
Manual paste fallback. Takes raw text dump from claude.ai, heuristically detects message boundaries, normalizes to capture-ready markdown.

categories.title: Iteration report system
categories.description: Self-bootstrapping: this very report was generated by the report generator.

items.description: Report generator. Takes a manifest JSON, produces self-contained HTML index of every artifact touched in an iteration.
Manifest for THIS iteration. Hand-written for now; future iterations may auto-generate from git diff + chat transcript.
ORB_STATE_MACHINE rule updated to 5 valid states (SHAY_THINKING officially joins). Architectural memory of why state machine doc/code drifted, lesson recorded.
